- [Death of Amy Winehouse (July 23, 2011)](amy-winehouse.md) — British soul singer Amy Winehouse died at 27 from alcohol poisoning, joining the "27 Club" and leaving behind an influential retro-soul legacy.
- [Steve Jobs (October 5, 2011)](steve-jobs.md) — Apple's co-founder and CEO, who reshaped personal computing, music, and mobile technology, died on October 5, 2011, at age 56.
